narrative:
Sutton Township has 2,117 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.4 percentage points.
